idea.hook: Ever dream of flying... without a plane? 🪶
facts: Saturn's moon Titan has an atmosphere ~4x denser than Earth's at sea level.
Its surface gravity is only 1/7th (~14%) of Earth's.
These conditions create a low-gravity, high-density air environment.
idea.payoff: A human with small, wearable wings could theoretically take flight and soar through Titan's orange skies!
idea.title: YOU Could FLY on Titan! 🤯🌌

scenes.text: Ever dream of flying... without a plane? 🪶
scenes.visual: Dreamy, swirling cosmic background, hinting at stars or distant planets. A faint silhouette of a person reaching upwards.
Split screen or overlay: Earth's thin blue atmosphere contrasted with Titan's thick, orange hazy atmosphere. Maybe a small icon showing 'density' e.g., molecules.
Simplified human figure (stylized) on Titan's orange surface, taking a long, floating leap. Saturn visible faintly in the background.
A graphic combining the previous concepts: a human figure on Titan, with arrows or lines indicating reduced downward pull and a cloud graphic representing thick air around them.

scenes.text: Theoretically, small wearable wings could let you SOAR on Titan!
scenes.visual: An astronaut-like human figure with small, elegant, mechanical wings gracefully soaring through Titan's orange, misty skies with Saturn glowing majestically in the distance. The figure is looking up, appearing free and weightless.
